prompt: A cinematic historical Chinese scene depicting the Empty Fort Strategy at dawn, viewed from outside a massive ancient city gate. In the foreground, a dark armored general on horseback, seen from behind in a flowing black cape, pauses with several spear-bearing soldiers and banners, facing the open gate in suspicion. The huge wooden gate doors stand fully open, revealing a long stone-paved street inside the city. Exactly 6 townspeople are visible inside, calmly sweeping the street with brooms, spaced along the road, creating an eerie sense of normalcy. Above the gate, on a timber balcony of a traditional tiled gatehouse, a calm strategist in white robes and a tall scholar’s headdress sits behind a guqin table, with a small incense burner sending up thin smoke. Exactly 3 attendants stand around him on the balcony. The city walls are built of aged gray stone, and ranks of soldiers with upright spears line the battlements in the background. Use authentic Three Kingdoms era architecture, weathered wood, layered roof tiles, muted earth tones, soft golden morning light, distant misty mountains, long shadows, atmospheric haze, ultra-detailed textures, dramatic vertical composition, epic historical realism, cinematic framing, and a tense, quiet mood.
